TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Baldwin_Lonsdale, title = Baldwin_Lonsdale, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baldwin_Lonsdale} }

S.FORM: Baldwin Lonsdale Baldwin Lonsdale u siwkay niza 5 bulad 8 demiad, Baldwin Lonsdale, u misingkiway. a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Vanuatu ayza sa ci Baldwin Lonsdale, micakat a demiad sa i 2014 a mihca 9 bulad 22 demiad. u ngangan niza u ngangan nu Hulam: ťģĎŚĺ∑śļę¬∑śúóśĖĮšĽ£Áąĺ u ngangan nu Lipun: „Éú„Éľ„Éę„ÉČ„ā¶„ā£„É≥„ÉĽ„āł„āß„ā§„ā≥„ÉĖ„āĹ„É≥„ÉĽ„É≠„É≥„āļ„Éá„Éľ„Éę u ngangan nu Amilika: Baldwin Jacobson Lonsdale
S.PHON: bar~…ĺdwin r~…ĺonsdar~…ĺ…ô bar~…ĺdwin r~…ĺonsdar~…ĺ…ô u siwkaj niza * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad, bar~…ĺdwin r~…ĺonsdar~…ĺ…ô, u misiŇčkiwaj. a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan) u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu *anuatu ajza sa ¶i bar~…ĺdwin r~…ĺonsdar~…ĺ…ô, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. u ŇčaŇčan niza u ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam: ******** u ŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺipun: ********************** u ŇčaŇčan nu amir~…ĺika: bar~…ĺdwin *a ¶obson r~…ĺonsdar~…ĺ…ô
